claim_boundary: Spatial q2 SD-endpoint-only bias+t evidence for mu1:x: SR475 coverage is near nominal for this endpoint, but the row is not inference_ready and not supported because mu2:x is below nominal/over MCSE gate, the correlation target is not promoted by this sidecar, and no Fisher/Rose row sign-off exists; this does not promote range-estimating spatial support, q4/q8, REML, AI-REML, bridge, or public support.

Spatial q2 SD-endpoint-only bias+t evidence for mu2:x: SR475 coverage is below nominal with MCSE above the 0.01 gate and upper-tail misses dominate, so the row is not inference_ready and not supported; this does not promote the correlation target, range-estimating spatial support, q4/q8, REML, AI-REML, bridge, or public support.

Animal q2 SD-endpoint-only bias+t evidence for mu1:x: SR475 coverage is near nominal for this endpoint, but the row is not inference_ready and not supported because mu2:x is borderline/over MCSE gate and the correlation target has no coverage-grid row after the denominator holdout; this does not promote pedigree/Ainv bridge marshalling, q4/q8, REML, AI-REML, bridge, or public support.

Animal q2 SD-endpoint-only bias+t evidence for mu2:x: SR475 coverage is borderline and MCSE is above the 0.01 gate, and the row is not inference_ready and not supported because the correlation target has no coverage-grid row after the denominator holdout; this does not promote pedigree/Ainv bridge marshalling, q4/q8, REML, AI-REML, bridge, or public support.
